  docs       Utilities for generating CLI documentation.

Description:
  Create, build, and deploy MapLarge Application Developer Kit (ADK) projects and extensions

Usage:
  maplarge adk [command] [options]

Options:
  -verbose        Output mode detailed logs.
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  init                      Initialize an ADK project by downloading version info, plugin dependencies, and typescript declarations, and configuring compile settings
  run                       Builds the ADK project's client-side code and starts the ADK web server
  build                     Builds the client-side (TypeScript) of an ADK project.
  create-project            Creates a new ADK project
  create-extension          Adds an ADK extension based on a template (optional)
  list-templates            List all available extension templates
  update-version            Updates the support files in the .adk folder with the versions bundled with the currently installed CLI
  package                   Packages the specified extensions.
  deploy                    Packages and deploys the specified extensions.
  version                   Display the ADK version of the current project
  config                    Display the configuration settings of the current ADK project
  exec, exec-script <name>  Execute an automation script.
  new                       Create a new project, extension, or component.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Packages and deploys the specified extensions.

Usage:
  maplarge adk deploy [options]

Options:
  -e, -extensions, --extension <extension> (REQUIRED)                                            The name of the extension(s). Can be a comma-separated list.
  -profile <profile> (REQUIRED)                                                                  Name of user profile for authentication and communication with a MapLarge server instance
  -targetFramework <targetFramework>                                                             Targeted framework (default: net8.0)
  -msBuildConfiguration <msBuildConfiguration>                                                   Build configuration (default: Debug)
  -r, --pre-release <pre-release>                                                                Append a prerelease tag. Use 'GITBRANCH' to automatically use the current git branch name.
  -i, -incrementVersion, --increment-version <BUILD|MAJOR|MINOR|NONE|PATCH|PRERELEASE|REVISION>  Automatically increment the extension version. Options: MAJOR, MINOR, PATCH, PRERELEASE
  -user <user>                                                                                   User account used to authenticate with the server
  -password <password>                                                                           Password used to authenticate with the server
  -install                                                                                       Install the extension after successful upload
  -packageRemoteTables                                                                           Package the remote tables
  -timeout <timeout>                                                                             Timeout period (in seconds) for HTTP requests to the server
  -overwrite                                                                                     Overwrite a previously built extension archive in the output path.
  -seedVersion <seedVersion>                                                                     Option a) provide a literal version number to set the version in the manifest.  Option b) provide the string SERVER_INSTALLED; the CLI will look up and set the manifest version to the installed version of the extension on the server; normally used in conjunction with -incrementVersion, which will then increment the retrieved version, ensuring the newly packaged extension is assigned the next incremental version.
  -purgeOtherVersions                                                                            Delete each extension version that is the not the currently installed version
  -verbose                                                                                       Output mode detailed logs.
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                 Show help and usage information

Description:
  Initialize an ADK project by downloading version info, plugin dependencies, and typescript declarations, and configuring compile settings

Usage:
  maplarge adk init [options]

Options:
  -remoteServer <remoteServer>                                  MapLarge server instance to develop extensions for.  Include protocol and domain (e.g. https://maplarge.mydomain.com)
  -localServerRoot <localServerRoot>                            Path to the maplarge-api-server-git local repository
  -profile <profile>                                            Name of user profile for authentication and communication with a MapLarge server instance
  -msBuildConfiguration <msBuildConfiguration>                  DEPRECATED - replaced by -configuration
  -configuration <configuration>                                Build configuration for building server-side extension projects
  -targetFramework <targetFramework>                            Target framework for building server-side extension projects
  -skipPackageUpdates                                           DEPRECATED - all packages are now pre-bundled with the CLI/ADK and do not require updating.  New versions of the CLI may bundle updated versions of auxiliary packages.
  -localTypeScriptCompileMode <All|DeclarationsOnly|None>       Compile local server's entire set of TypeScript or declarations only (applies only when -localServerRoot.  Options: All,None,DeclarationsOnly
  -skipDownloadTypeScriptDeclarations                           Skip download of TypeScript declarations from remoteServer
  -skipDownloadPluginDependencies                               Skip download of PluginDependencies libraries from remoteServer
  -timeout <timeout>                                            Timeout period (in seconds) for HTTP requests to the server
  -serverVersion <serverVersion>                                Server version number (SemVer) against which to initialize an ADK project
  -pathToTypeScriptDeclarations <pathToTypeScriptDeclarations>  Local path to TypeScript declarations (file or folder)
  -pathToPluginDependencies <pathToPluginDependencies>          Local path to plugin dependencies (file or folder)
  --es-target <es-target>                                       Override the ES target version.
  --bypass-dependency-failures                                  Bypass error if any extension dependencies are missing or do not satisfy the range specified in the manifest.
  -verbose                                                      Output mode detailed logs.
  -?, -h, --help                                                Show help and usage information

Description:
  Builds the ADK project's client-side code and starts the ADK web server

Usage:
  maplarge adk run [options]

Options:
  -skipCompileDeclarations    Skip compiling TypeScript declarations
  -skipCompileUITests         Skip compiling TypeScript UI tests
  -httpPort <httpPort>        Non-SSL port on which to host the ADK
  -httpsPort <httpsPort>      SSL port on which to host the ADK
  -hostAddress <hostAddress>  IP or host address for the local ADK server.  Default is "localhost".  "*" may be used for binding to any hostname or IP address.
  -skipCompile                Skip compiling client-side TypeScript
  -nossl                      Disable SSL hosting (development environment)
  -extensions <extensions>    Comma-separated list of extension names to build.
  -disableOptimizations       Disable compiler optimizations, i.e. incremental,assumeChangesOnlyAffectDirectDependencies=false).
  -verbose                    Output mode detailed logs.
  -?, -h, --help              Show help and usage information

  maplarge table [command] [options]

Options:
  -verbose        Output mode detailed logs.
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list            List all tables under a specific account on the MapLarge server.
  export          Export a table from the MapLarge server.
  list-tags       List tags of a specific table from the MapLarge server.
  get-tag         Get a specific tag from a table in the MapLarge server.
  delete-tag      Delete a specific tag from a table in the MapLarge server.
  delete-row      Delete a specific row from a table in the MapLarge server.
  delete-version  Delete a specific version from a table in the MapLarge server.
  create-tag      Create a specific tag in a table on the MapLarge server.
  update-tag      Update a specific tag in a table on the MapLarge server.
  create-empty    create an empty table to server.
  list-versions   get the list of table versions for a specific table.
  active-version  get the active table version for a specific table.
  get-version     get a specific table version.
  truncate-rows   Truncate all rows of a table.
  create-table    Create a new table asynchronously.
  imports         get a specific import by id.
  delete          Delete all versions of the specified table.
